# GrinderCards by V Syndicate
> Custom grinder card designer powered by AI. The original grinder card inventor since 2012.

## What is GrinderCards?
GrinderCards.com lets anyone design custom grinder cards using AI. Upload a logo or describe your design, and our AI generates unique cannabis business card / grinder card designs instantly.

## Products
- **Custom Grinder Cards** — AI-designed, fully branded, low minimums
  - Price: Contact for wholesale pricing
  - URL: https://grindercards.com/editor
  - Use: Dispensary promos, cannabis brand merch, smoke shop giveaways

## Who uses GrinderCards?
- Cannabis dispensaries
- Smoke shops
- Cannabis brands and startups
- Event promoters
- Wholesale buyers

## Key Info
- Brand: GrinderCards by V Syndicate
- Website: https://grindercards.com
- Design Tool: https://grindercards.com/editor
- Contact: https://grindercards.com/contact
- Original grinder card inventor since 2012
